name: Neon API
what_it_does: Serverless Postgres database with instant database branching, scale-to-zero, and a Management API for programmatic database and branch management - popular in the Vercel/Next.js ecosystem.
use_cases: Serverless Postgres for web apps with unpredictable traffic patterns
Creating database branches for testing in agent CI/CD workflows
Provisioning isolated Postgres databases for each tenant or test
Auto-scaling Postgres that scales to zero when not in use
Instant branching of production data for development/staging
not_for: Long-running database connections requiring persistent compute
Applications needing sub-millisecond latency without connection pooling
Workloads requiring guaranteed consistent high compute
best_when: You're building on Vercel/Next.js and want serverless Postgres with scale-to-zero and instant branching for testing and dev environments.
avoid_when: You have long-running transaction workloads, need consistent high compute, or require proprietary Postgres extensions not in Neon.

auth.notes: Management API uses Bearer token (API key). Database connections use standard Postgres credentials (user/password/host). API key for infrastructure, connection string for data.

pricing.free_tier_limits: Free: 0.5GB storage, 1 project, 10 branches, compute hours included
pricing.notes: Generous free tier. Serverless pricing means you only pay for compute when queries run. Very popular with Vercel's hobby and pro plans.

performance.rate_limits: Management API: 200 requests/second; database connections: standard Postgres limits

agent_readiness.error_message_notes: Management API has clear JSON errors. Postgres connection errors follow standard psql error format.
agent_readiness.idempotency_notes: Database operations are SQL-level idempotent with IF NOT EXISTS/ON CONFLICT. Management API branch creation is idempotent by name.
known_agent_gotchas: Cold start latency: scale-to-zero means first query after idle period has 100-500ms extra latency
Connection pooling via Neon proxy is recommended - raw connections have limits
Branch compute hours charged even on free tier if branches active for long
serverless driver (@neondatabase/serverless) required for edge/serverless environments
Database branching uses copy-on-write - branches start fast but diverge over time with writes
